productDisplayName: Numero Uno Men Navy Blue Flip Flop
description: Style Note Effortlessly comfortable and stylish, these flip flops from numero uno are all you need for a cool, casual look. Perfect for pool side or beach wear, or for popping on your feet when you want the easiest with this footwear. Product Details Grey and blue flip flops with rubber thong straps that are smooth for absolute comfort Textured, curved upper Rubber toe separator to hold the foot in place Rubber branding on the straps Rubber outsole with patterned herringbone grooves for grip Material and Care Rubber Wipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust Do not store in direct sunlight
